description: Our overall experience with Brand24 has been transformative for our foundation. It solved a massive visibility gap for us by acting as our "digital eyes and ears" in small towns across Poland. Before using it, we struggled to track how local media and social platforms covered our daily workshops and meetings, which are the most important part of our youth development program. Now, we can ensure that young people remain the protagonists of these stories through sentiment analysis. It is a powerful, future-ready tool that provides immense value to any organization focusing on social impact and nationwide reach.
author: Kuba D.
pros: What I value most about Brand24 is its incredible ability to "make the invisible visible" across dozens of small local communities in Poland. As an organization running the "Równać Szanse" program, we monitor youth projects in very small towns where traditional media monitoring often fails. Brand24 allows us to catch authentic stories from daily workshops and meetings, which we call "Moments of Power." The AI-driven insights and automated PDF reports save us around 10 to 15 hours of manual work every month. We also love the pace of development and the fact that the team is always one step ahead with new features. The partnership-based relationship with their support team makes the whole experience even better.
cons: I have not encountered any significant issues or features that I dislike so far. The tool is very intuitive and the team updates it frequently. If I had to mention one challenge, the sheer volume of data can be overwhelming at first, but the filtering options and AI summaries do a great job of helping us manage it. It is honestly difficult to find flaws in a product that evolves as quickly as Brand24 does.

review_title: Great platform backed by outstanding post-sales support
description: My overall experience has been very positive. The platform does what it promises, and the customer support has been outstanding. We’ve been able to use Brand24 as a valuable starting point to build a more robust social listening strategy tailored to our brands and the Mexican market. The team’s support has made a big difference.
author: Eduardo V.
pros: The post-sales support has been one of the best I’ve experienced with any monitoring tool. The Brand24 team genuinely takes the time to understand the business needs and provides personalized follow-up. The platform also delivers useful data to visualize mentions in real time, identify conversation spikes, and spot key influencers in a very intuitive way.
cons: At first, it can be a bit tricky to fine-tune filters so that only the truly relevant mentions come through—especially when the keyword being tracked is broad. It would also be incredibly helpful to have the ability to combine reports from multiple projects into a single PDF file. That way, you could generate a consolidated report with only the projects you actually need to include, without having to export and merge them manually.

review_title: Good but can be much better
description: could have been better if we had that call i requested for because the request from my client was very specific
author: Eli K.
pros: The interface is great and easy to navigate and i liked that the report was generated for me when i requested for it
cons: I asked for a call to take me through certain aspects and the response i got was for a suggestion to have an email conversation instead which was not sufficient. Also the results only go back as far as one year but i needed data from 2 to 3 years
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: 9/10 due to the reasons stated above. It's not really a con but it's something that added a step to our community management. Although I would say, having Brand24 really made our Community Managers' jobs easier.
author: Dana P.
pros: I like the responsiveness of the team, from [sensitive content hidden] . They are very helpful with our inquiries. I also like the AI Brand Assistant tool. It helps me to create reports faster.
cons: I do not see public Facebook profiles (only public pages are seen) and we were also to get mentions not related to the campaign (although this is very limited)
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: Very positive. It’s a powerful tool that gives us both real-time mentions and deeper insights. We use it to track our brand voice, spot trends, and even improve projects based on what people say. It’s a great mix of monitoring and strategy support.
author: Bartłomiej G.
pros: I really like how easy it is to see what people are saying about our brand. It helps us understand our audience better, not just during a crisis but also in everyday projects. The AI features are super useful, and the analytics show more than just numbers – they give us a clear picture of our brand’s image.
cons: Sometimes there’s a lot of data, and it takes a bit of time to go through everything. But once you get used to it, it’s actually helpful.

review_title: Wish you could capture the true reach of mentions
description: Great, the team is very responsive and very quick to support when we hit a wall. I also like the fact that I can give my team access.
author: Ndimbumi M.
pros: The fact that I can keep a pulse on mentions about the different projects we have. The weekly reports are also great
cons: The fact that It can not capture all the mention reach. I discovered a very huge gap between the reach I was capturing on a platform that only captures our social media pages(it was higher) that Brand24 which supposedly it should be capturing more reach since it tracks mentions.

review_title: Turning Conversations into Strategy: Our Journey with Brand24
description: Brand24 has empowered us to launch a robust social listening program and share meaningful insights with our broader organization. We’ve been able to track brand conversations in real time, identify trends, and better understand our audience’s needs and perceptions.
author: Jennifer B.
pros: Brand24 made it incredibly easy to get started with social listening. The setup was seamless, and there was virtually no learning curve, which is a huge relief when launching a new tool can often feel overwhelming. Their customer support team is fantastic, both during onboarding and as we continued to build out our program. They are responsive, knowledgeable, and genuinely invested in helping us succeed. Thanks to Brand24, we were able to quickly launch our social listening initiative and start sharing real-time insights about brand conversations across the business. It’s been a game-changer for how we understand and respond to our audience.
cons: Brand24’s filters can let irrelevant or incorrect content through, which affects the accuracy of insights. Boolean search and sentiment filters sometimes need refinement to better exclude noise or unrelated mentions, but that's the case with virtually any tool, so not really a con. Just more refinement may be needed to get drilled down to what we're looking for at times.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Great media monitoring option for small business!
author: Mariana P.
pros: I love that you can use it based on a monthly subscription and there is no lock in contracts. It works perfectly for small business. It is easy to use and set up.
cons: I don't like that you can't use {OR} on the project set up level. This makes my search come up with a lot of junk and then I have to filter relevant results. Also, the support team is based in Europe and I was never able to schedule a training session due to the time zone being so different than ours (Australia).

description: Brand 24 offers user-friendly data that can be sorted and scaled up or down in multiple ways for various team members. Their reporting options, price point and regular new features surpassed my experience with other services.
author: Leslie B.
pros: Digestible and scalable reports, along with easy to sort data that hits the main areas we're looking to capture.
cons: I had a few "wish list" items in the beginning of my time using Brand 24, but most were resolved in new feature roll outs.

description: Great. We had people reach out to assist us and we got the data we needed for our team to review to make informed decisions.
author: Megan F.
pros: I loved the daily snapshot emails you could set up to see your mentions. It was a concise way to review data.
cons: It’s a little confusing because there is so much in the platform. I would sometimes find myself digging around longer than anticipated to find needed data.

description: Although I didn't have the budget for this tool, I convinced my team and manager quickly after showing the value. It is a very easy tool, and customer support is always with you. I'm glad to know and understand what is going on in our market
author: Ens C.
pros: This is very straightforward for tracking mentions. The reporting capability is also effective, but the most important thing is Slack integration. After adjusting filters according to my needs, the team tracked all the mentions easily.
cons: The AI reporting system can be enhanced. I know it is new and it is okay for now, but it'd be exciting to see having "Brand24 Virtual Assistant"
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: very good for Cibersecurity and marketing
author: Luis S.
pros: Very easy to use and the price is fair, it includes a very extensive set of social networks
cons: Not easy to integrate with others solutions via API

review_title: Great media and social monitoring, saved us a ton of money
description: Overwhelmingly positive. Customer service is awesome, interface is great, and setup was super simple.
author: Taby F.
pros: The cost was perfect for us -- we were using a different product that we weren't happy with and switching saved us a ton of money. The interface is also much more modern and easily filterable. I love the Slack integration.
cons: Servers are in the EU so some news sites in the US are blocked there. This has not been a huge problem but has caused us to miss only a couple media mentions.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: A Brilliant Platform - Just Too Big for Us (For Now)
description: My overall experience with Brand24 has been excellent. It’s a polished and professional platform that delivered everything promised and more. The setup was smooth, the customer support was super responsive, and the insights were genuinely valuable. While we won’t be renewing right now because the project we needed it for has wrapped up, I wouldn’t hesitate to recommend Brand24 to larger agencies or companies that need social listening and media monitoring capabilities. If DXDMedia grows into bigger projects, it’s definitely a tool I’d come back to.
author: Deborah M.
pros: Brand24 is powerful for social listening and media monitoring. The dashboard is intuitive, the alerts are timely, and the insights are detailed. I liked how quickly it pulled in mentions from a wide range of sources. It’s the kind of tool that gives you an edge in reputation management. I bought the subscription for a specific project which has now come to an end.
cons: In all honestly, it’s too powerful for a small agency like ours. While the tool is brilliant, I think it’s designed for bigger brands or agencies running multiple, large-scale projects. For us, some features were underused simply because we didn’t have the volume of mentions or the scale to fully exploit them. Also, the pricing reflects its power - very fair, but a bit hefty for smaller outfits.

review_title: A Powerful and User-Friendly Media Monitoring Tool
description: Responsive Customer Support and Fair Value. But the less are historical data limitations and source gaps
author: Iyan R.
pros: Value for money, Clean, Actionable Dashboard, Influencer & Source Insights, and Strong Reporting Features
cons: Sentiment Accuracy Can Be Off, and Lack of Features in Integration or Data Sources.It is like some regions are not well covered, and some integrations are not available. Users sometimes complain that posts or mentions from certain platforms are missed, or that there are blind spots in source coverage.

description: Really great overall! It's an intuitive and helpful platform and served our needs well. The helpfulness and promptness from people like [sensitive content hidden] really stood out, and makes me want to come back. Data exports could be improved a bit but overall it got what we needed and included helpful metrics like Advertising Value Equivalency.
author: Caleigh C.
pros: Incredible service. [sensitive content hidden] was always there and would walk me through things and answer all questions promptly. Good value for money compared to other comparable services. Good quality data. Easy to use and learn how to use the platform (especially with [sensitive content hidden]).
cons: The format of downloaded mentions in the PDF report looked weird and wasn't super user friendly. Downloading data in general could be a bit easier. Tracking hashtag impressions would also be great.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: Great customer service and easy to use platform! It was seamless from start to finish to learn how to use brand24 and to teach my team.
author: Char S.
pros: Being able to monitor all of my posts for specific campaigns in an easy to use dashboard. It's very easy to have viewing capabilities to multiple things
cons: Some of the metrics are unavailable when clicking into them and having the time to figure out why they don't always report.

review_title: They deliver what we agreed on.
description: They deliver what we agreed on. They offer an adequate product at an appropriate price. They have a good feel for the market in which they operate.
author: Jan S.
pros: Precise communication from the Brand24 team. Useful updates ("I was just thinking about something like that"). Fair terms of cooperation.
cons: I expect more effective and relevant integrations with AI models. We are waiting for some game-changer that Brand24 will offer.

description: I use it for 1 year to monitor the brand mentions. Mostly in press and digital media. So it works good, but sometimes the AVe is not correct.
author: Yuliia D.
pros: It helps me to get all the mentions together in one place. Especially press mentions, which is very helpful.
cons: The keywords limitation – I think for such a big price there could be more keywords. The limitation applies to all projects combined, but in my opinion, it would be better to limit keywords per project

description: Amazing 10/10 Everything is great so far, for what we need and what we use it for, is amazing. Havent faced any issue so i can say its great
author: Muhammad A.
pros: Learning curve was great, the onboarding and having account manager really helps so thank you Security im not a pro but i feel its secure enough Value for money, too early to decide as we doing listening for a startup, but I beleive theres value even if its not measurable Amazing features theres a lot of good features, which are really helpful Subscription and payment is decent. I would say nothing more to mention about it. Reporting is amazing, except the part that there is no page of the mentions like if there could be an option to add in the report all mentions Logo design is good staright to the point
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: Brand24 has a user-friendly interface and pleasant UX, but the filter sometimes misses bad content :)
author: Marta Ż.
pros: The platform offers a user-friendly interface and an enjoyable, seamless experience for every user :)
cons: The filter sometimes lets incorrect content through, causing confusion or unexpected results. This should be improved.

description: good tool for social listening and a lot of capabilities. what i am most happy with is attention of willingness to help of agents.
author: marcos F.
pros: personalisation, filters, reports and capabilities. they help me so much to do my work. besides, customer service.
cons: geolocalisation: usually, filters do not work exactly and have to check each post/impact individually and manually
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: First time Brand24 user- give it a try!
author: Nicola G.
pros: It's easy to set up and provides great depth of information. It works with TikTok, Instagram etc
cons: The price. We only needed it for a specific campaign. If we could have afforded it I would probably have kept it.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Great value and good for small marketing teams
author: Rachel M.
pros: Setting up my first project was simple, and the cost for what I receive is very fair. I appreciate the regular updates, but my favorite feature is the reports. They are perfect for providing media information to our board of directors.
cons: I find that news mentions aren't always picked up and I have to add them manually.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: It has been a good experience. I am able to track down what is happening on certain topics and it is useful to get information unknown or that comes from various sources
author: Janna Vanessa P.
pros: The information provided, news and requests summarized properly
cons: The process on making projects because of the limit on key words
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months
